verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Back to where I was before I never realized I existed in the mind of Him Who caused the sun to shine And taught the birds to sing In His presence I am found again.

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: Now I live to praise Him To worship and adore Him I'm back to my origin I live in His sight again I'm shining like a morning star Translated in His majesty I'm back to my Origin I'm back in His arms again.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Trapped and shackled by this world I was bound in time But now I'm lifted to eternity Something's changed in me My soul has been set free I'm back to where my spirit Used to be.
